ggphasr 0.0.0.9000

  • Changelog

Package index

All functions

add_layer()
Add ggplot2 layers to a ggphasr_result object
classify_equilibrium()
Classify an equilibrium point of an ODE system
find_equilibrium()
Find equilibria of an ODE system numerically
gg_flow_field()
Plot a flow field (direction field) for an ODE system
gg_manifolds()
Draw stable and unstable manifolds of a saddle point
gg_nullclines()
Add nullclines to a phase plane plot
gg_phase_plane()
Complete phase plane analysis in a single call
gg_phase_portrait()
Add a 1D phase line to a phase portrait
gg_time_series()
Plot time series of ODE solutions
gg_trajectory()
Add solution trajectories to a phase plane plot
ode_competition()
Two-species Lotka-Volterra competition model
ode_example_01()
Example ODE system 1 (1D)
ode_example_02()
Example ODE system 2 (1D)
ode_example_03()
Example ODE system 3 (1D)
ode_example_04()
Example ODE system 4 (1D)
ode_example_05()
Example ODE system 5 (1D)
ode_example_06()
Example ODE system 6 (2D)
ode_example_07()
Example ODE system 7 (2D)
ode_example_08()
Example ODE system 8 (2D)
ode_example_09()
Example ODE system 9 (2D)
ode_example_10()
Example ODE system 10 (2D)
ode_example_11()
Example ODE system 11 (2D)
ode_example_12()
Example ODE system 12 (2D)
ode_example_13()
Example ODE system 13 (2D)
ode_example_14()
Example ODE system 14 (2D)
ode_example_15()
Example ODE system 15 (2D)
ode_exponential()
Exponential growth model
ode_lindemann()
Lindemann mechanism (chemical kinetics)
ode_logistic()
Logistic growth model
ode_lotka_volterra()
Lotka-Volterra predator-prey model
ode_monomolecular()
Monomolecular growth model
ode_morris_lecar()
Morris-Lecar neuron model
ode_simple_pendulum()
Simple pendulum model
ode_sir()
SIR epidemic model
ode_toggle()
Genetic toggle switch model
ode_van_der_pol()
Van der Pol oscillator
ode_von_bertalanffy()
Von Bertalanffy growth model
print(<ggphasr_result>)
Print method for gg_phase_plane() output
theme_phase_plane()
Phase plane ggplot2 theme

Developed by Jason Graham.
